title: Mpox (monkeypox): Technical documents for laboratory personnel and health professionals - Canada.ca
content:
## Mpox (monkeypox): Technical documents
The following is technical documents on mpox for various audiences.
- Monkeypox Living Evidence Profile

## Health professionals
- National Advisory Committee on Immunization (NACI) statements: Smallpox and mpox vaccines
- Smallpox and mpox vaccines: Canadian Immunization Guide
- Reporting adverse events following vaccination with Imvamune: Communiqué to healthcare professionals (October 31, 2022)
- Monkeypox:  Vaccination clinic resources

### Infection prevention and control
- Interim guidance on infection prevention and control for patients with suspected, probable or confirmed mpox within healthcare settings (November 2024)

### Surveillance and reporting
- Monkeypox:  Public health management of cases and  contacts in Canada
- Monkeypox:  National case definition

## Health sector preparation
- Federal, Provincial and Territorial Public Health Response Plan for the Management of the Monkeypox Outbreak
- Imvamune: Storage temperatures,  shelf life, shipment and supportive temperature excursion information

## Laboratory personnel
- Pathogen  Safety Data Sheets: Infectious Substances – Monkeypox virus
- Biosafety  advisory: Monkeypox virus (MPXV)
- Monkeypox virus: Laboratory licensing
